_comment_format: Each user record carries: username, role ('admin'|'user'), optional dataFolder. Passwords should be stored as PBKDF2-SHA256 hashes via 'passwordHash' + 'salt' (hex, 16 bytes) + 'iterations' (>=200000). The login flow accepts a legacy 'password' (plaintext) field for backwards compatibility, but on first sign-in the Admin dashboard will surface a SECURITY banner and a one-click 'Hash all plaintext' migrator. Always remove plaintext from this file as soon as possible — anyone who reads the public repo can see it.
_comment_seed: Default admin sign-in is admin / prophesy (plaintext). REPLACE THIS IMMEDIATELY: sign in once, run 'Hash all plaintext' in the admin dashboard, download the new users.json, commit it.
